cause_category_map.B: server serves API but not app route used by runner
cause_category_map.C: isolated runtime copy missing app static files
cause_category_map.D: runner target path does not match server static mount
cause_category_map.E: required asset verification logic is wrong
cause_category_map.F: backend and frontend require audit proxy/static composite mode

diagnosis: Runner used /neural_map_v0_6.html while V0.6 server serves the UI entry from /. This produced 404, prevented required CSS/JS requests, and invalidated FPS for full UI acceptance.
